feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP MDG CLass Characteristics Derivations Not working after Service pack updating from 9 to 12
entry.content:
Hi All,

we are running on SAP MASTER DATA GOVERNANCE 9.2  and EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0 with HDB Support pack 9.

After the implementation of the Support Packs 10, 11 and 12 on the SAP System we are facing issues like

  • Derivations done using BADI USMD_RULE_SERVICE_CROSS_ET with Derive method  for Class Characteristics not working as Previous 
  • When creating new materials we automatically assign classes based on the CR type and Material Group Some single value characteristics are duplicated on the UI screen and  causing fatal errors when saving.

When saving the CR some characteristic values disappear from the UI screen but the entered values remain present in the staging tables 

Any Inputs?

Thanks,

Panga

entry.title: MDG CE Groupings and Number ranges
entry.content:
Dear experts

I have read in the MDG Cloud Edition documentation, that the groupings and the number ranges are fixed and cannot be changed. I wanted to know how does it work in the case of the replication towards S4 HANA. Is it possible to transcodificate the original grouping from MDG-CE into the custom ones which are in S4 HANA, for example using a middleware and a custom field in MDG to store this information?

Will MDG be still able to recognise the key mapping of the record? 

Did anyone ever experienced this problem?

 

Thank you very much

best regards

entry.title: Suppress Custom uibb in sap mdg Customer
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have created the custom uibb in sap mdg for customer few months before and now we want to remove the block from the UI.

We have removed the block from the UI via configuration.

Doubt is, Is there an option to suppress the block completely so that when we create the Change request we observed that all the methods like get definition/flush/get_data/process event been called.

We want to suppress so that all these method of standard code will not run as it will be better in terms of performance. Thanks.

Kindly suggest me the same so that i dont want the custom entity to be called when the CR is created. 

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: how to concatenate material description values ?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am creating a material, selecting a characteristic value and populating it as material description value(using read_entity_data_all in GET_DATA of feeder class) of Descriptions block.

If there are multiple characteristic values, I would like to know how can i concatenate the material description values.

ex : A , B , C etc. under Material description

 

regards

Chandra Kishore.

entry.title: Can we customize the process template of workflow in cloud ready mode in sap MDG
entry.content:
Dear Team,

As we are aware, MDG on S/4HANA 2023 supports Cloud Ready Mode. Based on my understanding, in Cloud Ready Mode, rule-based workflows cannot be used, and instead, build process automation workflows must be implemented.

As per my client’s requirements, we need to customize the build process automation workflow. If anyone has encountered a similar requirement, please confirm whether customization is possible or share any relevant documentation that could help us achieve this.

Looking forward to your insights.

Best regards,
Rahul Khandelwal

@0012anirban @Mark63

entry.title: file upload in fiori using usmd_file_upload
entry.content:
@MDG 

I am using a file upload fiori application and uploading excelfile. In excel i have cost center data fields. after upload cost center data will overwrite data with file data using change request. But the problem here is i have name,name1,name2,name3,name4 . but name data from excel is overwritten on name1 and name1 data from excel is overwritten on name2 and  so on. How to identify is there any mapping or how the system is reading. i don't see any logic in class, badi etc.

entry.title: DRF Outbound Implementation 986_3, how to figure out whether its a creation or change.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to restrict BP change details to be sent to 3rd party system. I checked the configs in DRFIMG. With Outbound Implementation 986_3, how to figure out whether its a creation or change.

entry.title: Need to set return vendor check as part of MDG Supplier
entry.content:
We are not maintaining Customer master in MDG, but need to set return vendor check in Supplier as the flag is needed in S4.

Kindly confirm how we can maintain as when we enable Return Vendor check then customer master is must.

entry.title: Has anyone worked with a customer who is making use of MDG and Product Compliance?
entry.content:
Are there any customers who are using MDG as well as S/4HANA Product Compliance?

Idea is to set the compliance relevant tick in MDG for the material by creating the necessary view in MDG.  Then transfer the material to S/4HANA instance.

Would that then automatically flag the Product Steward as if a new material has been created directly in S/4HANA or would a customization be required to make sure the flagging will be executed.

entry.title: Enhance OVP page in mdg fpm
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a doubt as below.

We have the Customer page for MDG FPM UI screen of custom one. Usually we were enhancing things on the BP_SECTION area.

Now, we want to enhance the section : TECHNICAL ...Hope we can enhance it right?

or will be there any impact on the UI Page if i modify things in the Section:Technical .Kindly guide me the same. Thanks.

 

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: I want to change customer and vendor from internal number range to external number range in MDG.
entry.content: Right now all customer and vendors have internal number range assignment in MDG. I need to change it to external number range. Please provide me neccessary configuration to be done.

entry.title: SAP MM - What material features determine that I have to create a new material
entry.content:
SAP MM - What material features determine that I have to create a new material (enter a new ID number) and what changes can I make without changing the ID number?

I mean the data that I provide during the MM01 process

entry.title: Missing Change Request Type Selection in Fiori "Manage Business Partner" App
entry.content: I am creating a new change request using the Fiori app Manage Business Partner. However, I am immediately prompted to fill in all the fields without the option to select the change request type. I remember that in NWBC, I had the ability to choose the change request type before proceeding. Why doesn’t the list of change request types pop up in Fiori?

entry.title: Global value in sap mdg fpm : mv_fpm_edit_mode
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a doubt as below.

For example, we have some 5 custom blocks in sap mdg for customer.

When we do the global edit in the OVP page of sap mdg for customer, parameter mv_fpm_edit_mode holds value to 'E' only to few blocks in get_data...and not for all the blocks.

Do i need to do some settings so that the parameter mv_fpm_edit_mode  holds as 'E' whenever user does the global edit.

Kindly suggest me the same. thanks.

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: Short Dump Business function MDG_ERP_CUSTOMER_12 must be active
entry.content:
Hi,

I’m frequently encountering a short dump when trying to open the Manage Business Partner app. Strangely, the app sometimes works, but other times it crashes.

I attempted to activate the relevant business function, but I received a message stating that activation is not needed.

Has anyone else experienced a similar issue? Any insights would be greatly appreciated.

S4HANA ON PREMISE 2023 02 (10/2024) .

entry.title: How to hide some "screen" on MDG
entry.content:
Hello team, 

In the context of GDPR, I would like to hide the BANK ACCOUNT section based on a role assigned to the user.

To access MDG, I go through the Fiori launchpad.

Do you know if it is possible to hide certain screens based on roles in MDG? If so, how can it be done?

Thanks


PI : 
BS_BP_BANK_ACCOUNT id of UIBB of BANK ACCOUNT in web dynpro BS_SP_OVP

entry.title: Default Values in the Search Input of Cost Center Hierarchy in MDG
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have requirement to default the value of the Edition, controlling area and Cost center hierarchy in the attached screenshot. I tried to check the feed class but the feeder class is not available in the technical help. Any suggestion or hits are highly appreciated.

Thanks!!

entry.title: Adding cost center Hierarchy field in the cost center search screen in SAP MDG
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have requirement to add the Hierarchy assignment field in the cost center display screen. When we search for any cost center we need to add the Hierarchy assignment field to be displayed along with the other cost center fields.  Any suggestion or hits, how can we achieve this are highly appreciated.

 

Thanks!!

entry.title: Vendor Creation Approval Workflow
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m currently working on setting up a workflow in SAP S/4HANA for Vendor Creation using BP T-Code, where a manager's approval is required before the vendor is created. I want to ensure that the process runs smoothly and efficiently.

If you have experience with SAP workflows, approval processes, or best practices in workflow automation, I would love to hear your insights! Any guidance, documentation, or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Your help would be incredibly valuable, and I’d be happy to exchange ideas on SAP-related topics as well. Looking forward to learning from this amazing community!

entry.title: DRF IDOC Errors
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,
Hope all are doing good.
I'm currently working on implementing Data Replication Framework (DRF) in SAP Master Data Governance (MDG) for material data replication between two systems:

Sender: SAP S/4HANA MDG 1909
Receiver: SAP S/4HANA MDG 2020

I've completed the following IDoc configuration

Sender System (1909)
1. Configured Logical System (SALE)
2. Assigned Logical System (SALE)
3. Set up RFC Destination (SM59)
4. Configured Port (WE21)
5. Created Distribution Model (BD64)
6. Generated Partner Profile
7. Distribute the Model View

Receiver System (2020)
1. Configured Logical System (SALE)
2. Assigned Logical System (SALE)
3. In Distribution Model Create Partner Profile (BD64)


After completing these configurations, I tested the setup using transaction code 'BD10' For Material the IDoc status in the sender system shows success. However, although data is being received in the receiver system, it's not being created.

I've attached the error details for your reference. Could you please help me troubleshoot this issue?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.
